title: Omeyocan
description: Full UX/UI design for Omeyocan: user research, wireframes, high-fidelity prototype, and final interface.

process.challenge: Omeyocan required a user experience design from scratch, with deep research to understand the needs of its users.
process.approach: I conducted user research, defined flows and information architecture, developed low and high-fidelity wireframes, and delivered a final prototype in Figma.
process.results: High-fidelity prototype validated with users, ready for development.
